ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used by the country (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Measurement system used in the country (e.g., Metric, Imperial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the size belongs to */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range for the size (e.g., 8-10, 12-14) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the category is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the given size */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last reordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the customer belongs to */,
  "size_preference" TEXT /* Size preference of the customer (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the given size */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
